summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DonatariaSAT - all backend APIs (27/27 tests passed) and frontend pages working correctly. Tested new features: Alertas AML, Reportes, Workflows pages and their CRUD operations.

issues: Minor: Recharts console warning about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic only, chart renders correctly

passed_tests: Health endpoint responds correctly
Root API endpoint returns DonatariaSAT message
User login with test@donataria.org / Test1234! works
Get current user (auth/me) returns user data
Donantes CRUD - list, create, get by ID, update
Alertas - list, stats, rules list, create rule, toggle rule, create manual alert
Reportes - list, plantillas list, create plantilla, create reporte, update estado
Workflows - list, create, toggle, update
CSV Exports - donantes, alertas, donativos
Dashboard stats API returns KPIs
Landing page loads with DonatariaSAT branding
Login page renders with email/password form and Google button
Dashboard page loads with stats, chart, and sidebar navigation
Donantes page loads with table, 'Nuevo Donante' button, 'Exportar CSV' button
Alertas page loads with tabs (Alertas/Reglas), stats cards, 'Nueva Regla' button
Reportes page loads with tabs (Reportes/Plantillas), 'Generar Reporte' button
Workflows page loads with 'Nuevo Workflow' button and workflow list
Workflow dialog opens correctly with all form fields
Donativos page loads correctly with table
CFDIs page loads correctly with simulation mode notice
Calendario page loads correctly with semáforo indicators
Navigation sidebar has all links: Dashboard, Donantes, Donativos, CFDIs, Calendario Fiscal, Transparencia, Alertas AML, Reportes, Workflows, Configuración

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load correctly, all features working)

seed_data_creation: Test data created during backend tests with TEST_ prefix for donantes, alert rules, reportes, plantillas, and workflows
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from the review request have been tested and are working. The app is a SaaS platform for Mexican charities (donatarias autorizadas) with tax compliance features. Key pages: Dashboard (KPIs), Donantes (donor management), Donativos (donations), CFDIs (tax receipts - MOCKED PAC integration), Calendario Fiscal (fiscal calendar with semáforo indicators), Transparencia (transparency reports), Alertas AML (anti-money laundering alerts with rules engine), Reportes (reports for UIF/SAT), Workflows (automation). All CRUD operations work via API. CSV exports available for donantes, donativos, and alertas.

mocked_apis.CFDI_PAC_Integration: CFDI timbrado (stamping) is MOCKED - returns simulated UUID. Real PAC integration deferred to v1.5
